mapper.sql: id, title, slug, summary, content, cover_image, category_id, user_id, view_count, comment_count, like_count, is_top, is_deleted, create_time, update_time
mapper.select:
SELECT FROM blog_article WHERE is_deleted = 0
AND (title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR summary LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
AND category_id = #{categoryId}
ORDER BY is_top DESC, create_time DESC
SELECT FROM blog_article WHERE slug = #{slug} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE blog_article SET view_count = view_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE blog_article SET comment_count = comment_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE blog_article SET like_count = like_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM blog_article WHERE is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY view_count DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT FROM blog_article WHERE is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT FROM blog_article WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND is_top = 1 ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) as totalArticles, SUM(view_count) as totalViews, SUM(comment_count) as totalComments FROM blog_article WHERE is_deleted = 0
SELECT FROM blog_article WHERE is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO blog_article (title, slug, summary, content, cover_image, category_id, user_id, view_count, comment_count, like_count, is_top, is_deleted) VALUES (#{title}, #{slug}, #{summary}, #{content}, #{coverImage}, #{categoryId}, #{userId}, #{viewCount}, #{commentCount}, #{likeCount}, #{isTop}, #{isDeleted})
mapper.update: UPDATE blog_article SET is_deleted = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
